changes.description: Added YAML frontmatter (name, tags, appliesTo) to all 15 skill files. Tags categorize skills by domain/workflow/quality/security/testing/debug/release/performance. appliesTo maps each skill to commands that reference it.

Replaced 3 hardcoded review tables (Security, Performance, Design Patterns — 28 lines) with a single Manual Review section referencing .claude/skills/code-review.md as the authoritative source. REVIEW.json fields remain the structured data target.

verification.command: discover_skills() — all 15 skills have valid frontmatter
